description: Sample queries that hit the trained gap analyzer + proposal retriever. Use these in the viva to demonstrate that the system retrieves real SLIIT-paper-grounded results.

gap_analysis.expected_signal: Returns gaps from SLIIT papers about ML for disease prediction (CKD, diabetes, etc.)
Returns gaps from SLIIT supply-chain / logistics papers

gap_analysis.query: deep learning for crop disease detection
gap_analysis.expected_signal: Returns gaps from agriculture / image-classification papers
Returns gaps about low-resource language NLP from SLIIT papers
Returns IoT / cybersecurity gaps with future-work signals
Returns finance-security gaps with limitation signals

proposal_generation.topic: deep learning for crop disease detection
proposal_generation.expected_signal: Composes problem statement citing a SLIIT agriculture paper, retrieves 5 top exemplars

proposal_generation.topic: real-time fraud detection in mobile banking
